text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No matter how hard training gets, Hishi
Akebono's smile never falters.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I want to do everything I can to support her, so I
cut back on sleep to maximize my work hours.
Then, on one of my days off...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hello, Trainer! I had a feeling you'd be here, even
though it's our day off.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Why don't you take a break so we can have
teatime? ☆
choice_data_list: Thanks, but I still have work to—

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: All aboard the Teatime Train!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Aaand hup!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Stay still or you might get hurt! Okay, here we
gooo! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without warning, Hishi Akebono throws me over
her shoulder and carries me off to the...
choice_data_list: What are we doing at the cafeteria?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I asked if we could borrow the school kitchen a
little, to make some food!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Some of the desserts are already done, so I'll go
get them!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Thanks so much for waiting! ☆ Your first course is
doughnuts and ice cream!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She places a plate on the table and I see the
cutesy little doughnuts half-dipped in chocolate
next to some scoops of gorgeous emerald ice
cream.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The food looks incredible, but my attention is
elsewhere.
choice_data_list: Is that your signature racewear you're wearing?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It is! Isn't it great? They made it just the way I
asked!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you'd better hurry and eat up before the ice
cream melts. There are still plenty more dishes to
come!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She brings out dessert after dessert. I eat every
one, letting their sweetness spread throughout my
body, but it's not until I'm almost full that I realize
something.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hm? What's wrong, Trainer?
choice_data_list: The desserts you've been serving me...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
You finally noticed? Ehehe! That's right!
Everything I served you is somewhere on my
signature racewear!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's true. Doughnuts, ice cream, and strawberry
shortcake have all been worked into the design of
her outfit.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Um... Trainer? Did you think the doughnuts and
cake were buono?
choice_data_list: Of course! They were very buono!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! What a relief! Buono things bring so much
happiness!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I'm full and happy... I just can't help
smiling.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
That's why I thought it'd be nice if I could cheer
everyone up a little just by showing them my
signature racewear! Y'know, before and after I
race!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It'd mean a lot to me if I got to see the crowds
smiling with their whole heart, just like you are
now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that she mentions it, my expression's
probably been stern lately, what with how busy
I've been.
choice_data_list: Thank you so much for the wonderful meal!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
You're very welcome! But there are still some
cookies left, so I'll go bake them now! ☆
choice_data_list:
Do they look like the ones on your shoes and
back?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
They do! I made some in different shapes too,
though.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! I wonder which shape you'll like the most...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Wait right here! I'll bring you aaall the buono so
you can smile from ear to ear! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The cookies are warm and subtly sweet, and they
almost taste like Hishi Akebono's hopes made
into dessert form.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you don't have to! I know you're exhausted,
so you can sit back and rela—
choice_data_list: I want to make more buono things with you.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Make more buono? ...With me?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Okay... Yeah, sure! It won't be the same if we
don't make them together! ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Let's create lots of lots of buono things, Trainer!
The more buono, the more smiles there'll be! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The cookies we bake are a mix of different shapes
and tastes, and they turn out to be the funnest,
most buono cookies I've ever made!
